column1: # Expected failures for doc snippet tests.
# Sequential robot snippets — FIXED with test setups (callback snippets)
# Standalone stepping loop references simulation_app from standalone_start_and_scene.py (creates SimulationApp)
# Code fragment referencing undefined 'create_parent_xforms' from prior context
# Sequential cloner snippets — FIXED with test setups + migrated to experimental API
# Missing modules or API changes in current build
# Extension not available in default build
# Require external robot USD assets (Nucleus server)
# Sequential snippets referencing articulation/controller from prior context (need Nucleus assets)
# Deprecated cortex framework — deeply embedded class fragments with undefined bases
# isaacsim.robot.poser not available in base.python.kit experience
# Needs actual robot with links/joints for GenerateRobotLinkTree
# Low-level Kit bootstrap fragments — cannot run inside existing SimulationApp
# Code fragment referencing articulations from prior snippet — COMBINED into wrapping_articulations.py
# ROS2 bridge node types not available in default experience
# RTX lidar sequential snippets — need ROS2 bridge or undefined context vars
# ROS2 launch file fragments — undefined vars (map_yaml_file
# Code fragment referencing JointState from rclpy (not installed)
# OmniGraph with ROS2 bridge nodes (not available in default experience)
# Code fragment referencing prior snippet's graph path
# Pseudocode snippet — RtxCamera constructor fails (prim path /rig/camera_color doesn't resolve)
# USD generated by create_camera_depth_sensor.py not guaranteed to exist by the time this snippet is tested
# Migration "before" snippet that deliberately references an undefined `rawPtr`
# (the raw GMO buffer pointer that the removed OgnIsaacReadRTXLidarData node would
# have produced). NameError is the expected outcome.
# Sequential OmniGraph snippets — reference /action_graph/print (PrintText node) from prior tutorial step
# omni.graph.ui_nodes.PrintText not available in headless test environment
# Newton physics engine not available in default build
# Extension module not importable in default build
# Class with relative import (.rmpflow) — not standalone-testable
# Extension not available in default experience
# Modules not available in default test environment
